header.title: Build Your Custom Mattress
header.description: Design a mattress that fits your exact body, sleep style, and budget. Choose any size, any thickness, and configure your layers — we build and ship it in 7 days or less.

steps.title: Pick Your Size
steps.description: Choose from our 5 standard sizes or enter exact custom dimensions. We support any length from 48" to 96" and any width from 24" to 84".

options.label: Single (75×48)
options.description: Ideal for single beds, children's rooms

options.label: Custom Size
options.description: Enter exact L × W for your bed frame

steps.title: Choose Your Comfort Level
steps.description: Pick the comfort profile that matches your sleeping style. Need help? Our sleep consultants are on WhatsApp.

options.label: Plush (Nirvana-style)
options.description: Maximum cloud-like softness. Best for side sleepers and those who love sinking in.

options.label: Medium-Soft (Ananda-style)
options.description: Balanced soft contour with support beneath. Great all-rounder for couples.

options.label: Medium (Prakriti-style)
options.description: Firm enough for back support with a soft comfort feel. Ideal for back sleepers.

options.label: Medium-Firm (Arogya-style)
options.description: Posture-supportive with a gentle cushion. Recommended by physiotherapists.

options.label: Firm (Sthira-style)
options.description: Maximum orthopedic firmness. Best for chronic back issues and stomach sleepers.

steps.title: Pick Your Layer Thickness
steps.description: Select total mattress thickness. More latex = better pressure relief and longevity.

options.label: 6 inch
options.description: Compact premium — 6" pure latex. Great for platform beds.

options.label: 8 inch
options.description: Standard recommended — 4" rebond + 4" latex. Best value.

options.label: 10 inch
options.description: Luxury build — 4" rebond + 2" HR softy + 4" latex. Ultimate comfort.

ctaSection.buttonText: Get My Custom Quote on WhatsApp
ctaSection.note: Price on request for custom sizes. Our team responds within 30 minutes during business hours.

seo.metaTitle: Custom Mattress Builder | Design Your Mattress — RelaxPro
seo.metaDescription: Build your own custom size and comfort mattress with RelaxPro. Any dimensions from 48" to 96" × 24" to 84". Pure GOLS-certified Kerala latex. Instant WhatsApp quote.
